channel.title: Refugee Tools on Datadripco
channel.description: Recent content in Refugee Tools on Datadripco

item.title: Crypto's Geopolitical Armor: Bitcoin's Stand Amid Iran Tensions
item.description: With Trump rattling sabers over Iran's oil fields and Middle East chaos heating up, Bitcoin's not budging—let's dive into how this digital powerhouse weathers the storm and could become a real lifeline for those caught in the crossfire.
